items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for fallback channel policy.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Fallback channel policy when preferred channel is blocked'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding how the system handles fallback channels when the preferred channel is blocked. The linked use case mentions the need for this fallback policy but lacks concrete evidence that this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive status.
